sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after UP
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'W', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(p[0] for p in b)
        minc = min(p[1] for p in b)
        maxr = max(p[0] for p in b)
        maxc = max(p[1] for p in b)
        if n['pixels'] <= 20:
            print(f"id={n['id']:2d} color={n['color']} px={n['pixels']:3d} [{minr},{minc}]-[{maxr},{maxc}] children={n['children']}")

# Check the ASCII around the tokens
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(27, 34):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][15:35]
    row_str = row_str.replace('g', '·')
    print(f"R{i}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

- Right container: [26,44]-[30,48] (rows 26-30, cols 44-48)

- Token with black center: at [30,27]-[32,29]
- Purple wall: [21,33]-[41,38]

- Left platform: cols 9-26 (white)

- Purple wall: cols 33-38
- Right platform: cols 39-53 (white)
